name: Scan page accepts a diff and displays Trust Score
description: When a user pastes a git diff into the scan text area and submits it, the app processes the diff and displays a Trust Score between 0 and 100 along with any detected findings.

planSteps.description: Click the Scan or Analyze button to submit the diff
A Trust Score between 0 and 100 is displayed on the results panel
At least one finding or pattern is shown describing why the code is suspicious
